source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.5|seg.1.1.1.6
distilled_thesis: Once wisdom grows overfull, the route names the need for outstretched hands, making recipients structurally necessary for gift.
